object.name: editEphemeralMessageText
object.description: Use this method to edit an ephemeral text message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message edit event, especially if they are offline. On success, True is returned.
object.html_description: Use this method to edit an ephemeral text message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message edit event, especially if they are offline. On success, True is returned.
object.rst_description: Use this method to edit an ephemeral text message. Note that it is not guaranteed that the user will receive the message edit event, especially if they are offline. On success, :code:`True` is returned.

annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format :code:`@username`
